**James Stewart's Films:**
- The FBI Story: Richard L. Breen, Don Whitehead, John Twist
- Made for Each Other: Renée Taylor, Joseph Bologna
- After the Thin Man: Dashiell Hammett
- Broken Arrow: Graham Yost
- Take Her, She's Mine: Henry Ephron, Nunnally Johnson, Phoebe Ephron
- Mr. Smith Goes to Washington: Lewis R. Foster, Sidney Buchman

- The Shootist: Glendon Swarthout, Miles Hood Swarthout, Scott Hale
- No Highway in the Sky: Nevil Shute
- You Can't Take It with You: George S. Kaufman, Moss Hart
- The Man from Laramie: Thomas T. Flynn, Frank Burt, Philip Yordan
- Mr. Hobbs Takes a Vacation: Edward Streeter
- Destry Rides Again: Max Brand
- Two Rode Together: Will Cook
- The Shopworn Angel: Waldo Salt, Dana Burnet
- The Naked Spur: Sam Rolfe, Harold Jack Bloom
- Anatomy of a Murder: John D. Voelker, Wendell Mayes
- Winchester '73: Borden Chase, Robert L. Richards
- The Shop Around the Corner: Miklós László, Samson Raphaelson
- Harvey: Mary Chase, Joseph Dougherty
- The Far Country: Borden Chase

**Paulette Goddard's Films:**
- The Cat and the Canary: Written by (unknown)
- Second Chorus: Johnny Mercer
- Kitty: Rosamond Marshall, Karl Tunberg
- Hold Back the Dawn: Billy Wilder, Charles Brackett, Ketti Frings

- The Young in Heart: Charles Bennett, Paul Osborn
- On Our Merry Way: Arch Oboler, Laurence Stallings, Lou Breslow
- The Ghost Breakers: Paul Dickey, Walter DeLeon, Charles W. Goddard
- Reap the Wild Wind: Thelma Strabel
- An Ideal Husband: Oscar Wilde, Oliver Parker
- North West Mounted Police: Alan Le May, C. Gardner Sullivan
